name: hey-codex
description: Delegate selected tasks to a separate Codex CLI invocation when explicitly requested.

interface.shortDescription: Run a separate Codex CLI task on demand
interface.longDescription: Invoke a second Codex CLI process for isolated read-only analysis, review, suggestions, or carefully scoped full-auto runs when the user explicitly asks.
defaultPrompt: Ask a separate Codex CLI run for a second opinion on this refactor.
Run a read-only Codex review on the current branch.
Delegate this task to another Codex process and summarize the result.
